title: Pedicure Foot File and Callus Remover for Hard Skin,Cleaning Pumice Stone 4 in 1 Foot Scrubber,Removing Corn Dead Skin Cracked Heels Debris,Foot Files for Wet and Dry Cracked Feet,Bath Pedicure Salon
features: 4-in-1 Foot Pedicure Kit:Concentrated multi-purpose of foot care in one tool, help save space and cost with this versatile foot file.

Premium Material: This multifunctional pumice stone for feet hard skin is constructed from high-quality foot pumice, bristles, iron, sand, and wood. All parts are securely fitted, offering durability and preventing easy detachment.
Size: 19.5cm/7.67inch*4.5cm/1.77inch, This 4 in 1 pedicure foot file provides an all-in-one foot care solution.

How to use:Brush is for cleaning dead skin, nail, debris; Stainless steel feet file is for grinding off thick and hard calluses; Pumice stone is for feet hard skin or exfoliating cutin; Sand paper is for grinding thin horny crust and smoothing feet.

Best Home Spa Foot Care: No need for expensive care routines when you can maintain your feet comfortably at home. This multi-purpose foot stone is designed to hold all parts securely, preventing them from falling off.
description: Product description Specifications: Material: Professional Coarse and Fine sandpaper and Sturdy Plastic Handle Dimension:19.5cm/7.67inch*4.5cm/1.77inch Design: Multipurpose foot file design, 4 in 1 function includes pumice stone, stainless fine file, grit sandpaper file, foot file and cleaning brush. How to Use? Our foot file can be used on dry or wet feet, but for best results we recommend using after you bathe or shower, or after soaking your feet in warm water for 10 - 15 minutes. Rub the foot file over your callus, using light to medium pressure. If you start with the coarse side of the foot file, finish up with the fine side. Be careful not to over do it, especially if it's your first time using a callus remover. Too much abrading can leave your skin red and sore the next day. You can apply foot or hand lotion after filing. Hang up your foot file to dry after use. Prolonged exposure to moisture will shorten the life of the file. Please Note: Do not mix use, to avoid beriberi and other issues. Directions 1.
